t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Primary key. Allocated by Internal.GetPositionID_Bigint. Unique per position.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Primary key. Allocated by Internal.GetPositionID_Bigint. Unique per position. Passthrough from Dim_Position.
Customer ID. References Customer.Customer. Filtered to PI population (GuruStatusID IN 2-6, IsValidCustomer=1) and CopyFund accounts (AccountTypeID=9). Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: FK to Trade.Instrument. Financial instrument being traded.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Trade.Instrument. Financial instrument being traded. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Leverage multiplier (1, 5, 10, etc.). Determines margin and settlement type.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Leverage multiplier (1, 5, 10, etc.). Determines margin and settlement type. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Position size in currency. Must be >= 0. Stored in dollars (PositionOpen divides by 100 from cents).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Position size in currency. Must be >= 0. Stored in dollars (PositionOpen divides by 100 from cents). Synced via UPDATE when value changes in Dim_Position. Passthrough from Dim_Position.
1 = Long/Buy (profit when price rises), 0 = Short/Sell. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: When position was persisted (mapped from Occurred in production). Default getutcdate().
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: When position was persisted (mapped from Occurred in production). Default getutcdate(). Passthrough from Dim_Position.
When close was persisted. '1900-01-01 00:00:00' sentinel = still open. Synced via UPDATE from Dim_Position.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added sentinel info from Dim_Position Section 2.1 — enrichment, not semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Copy-trade parent. 0/1 = root. Positive = child of referenced position.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Copy-trade parent. 0/1 = root. Positive = child of referenced position. Passthrough from Dim_Position.
Original parent before any detachment. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: FK to Trade.Mirror. 0/NULL = manual. Positive = copy-trade position.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Trade.Mirror. 0/NULL = manual. Positive = copy-trade position. Used to filter manual positions (MirrorID=0) for PI classification and instrument analysis. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: ETL-computed date int (YYYYMMDD) derived from OpenOccurred. E.g., 20260310. Used for date-range filtering. NOT a FK to Dim_Date by default.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: ETL-computed date int (YYYYMMDD) derived from OpenOccurred. E.g., 20260310. Used for date-range filtering. NOT a FK to Dim_Date by default. Used as DELETE+INSERT key for daily incremental refresh. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: ETL-computed date int (YYYYMMDD) derived from CloseOccurred. 0=still open, 19000101=ETL transient state, YYYYMMDD=closed. Partition column. Always include in WHERE clause.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: ETL-computed date int (YYYYMMDD) derived from CloseOccurred. 0=still open, 19000101=ETL transient state, YYYYMMDD=closed. Synced via UPDATE from Dim_Position. Passthrough from Dim_Position.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped 'Partition column. Always include in WHERE clause' — Dim_Position-specific advice irrelevant to this non-partitioned table

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: ETL-computed approximation of USD value: ROUND(AmountInUnitsDecimal * InitForexRate * USD conversion, 0).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: ETL-computed approximation of USD value: ROUND(AmountInUnitsDecimal * InitForexRate * USD conversion, 0). Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Original FullCommissionOnClose before reopen adjustments. ETL: CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN CommissionOnClose ELSE 0.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Original FullCommissionOnClose before reopen adjustments. ETL: CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN CommissionOnClose ELSE 0. Synced via UPDATE from Dim_Position. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Prorated full commission for partial close. Same proration formula as CommissionByUnits applied to FullCommission.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Prorated full commission for partial close. Same proration formula as CommissionByUnits applied to FullCommission. Synced via UPDATE from Dim_Position. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

issues.problem: Added sentinel value context ('1900-01-01 00:00:00' = still open) not in the upstream element-level description. This is enrichment from Dim_Position Section 2.1, not semantic loss. Acceptable.
Dropped Dim_Position-specific advice about partition pruning ('Partition column. Always include in WHERE clause'). Correct omission since BI_DB_PI_Positions is not partitioned.
The ~3,400 active PI/CopyFund population size is mentioned only in the ETL pipeline diagram. Could be more prominent in the opening summary.
No explicit Phase Gate Checklist with [x] marks. Footer shows 'Phases: 11/14' but individual phase completion status is not itemized.

skipped_phases: Phase Gate Checklist not explicitly shown
